'''Mendarn Arms''' was a weapons manufacturing company that produced weapons systems for [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. One of their products was the [[Dar-2 ion cannon]], which were part of the [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]'s standard armaments.<ref name="HESB" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-07-XX -->''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]''
